mundo.titulo: Rugby star Sinfield and authors Blackman and Donaldson lead honours list
mundo.resumen: Noughts & Crosses author Malorie Blackman and Gruffalo creator Julia Donaldson are made dames, as the rugby league star is knighted.

mundo.titulo: Are the Downing Street dominoes about to fall?
mundo.resumen: John Healey's resignation as defence secretary is a disaster for the prime minister, writes Laura Kuenssberg.

mundo.titulo: Married at First Sight Australia stars not told partners had drug and violence convictions
mundo.resumen: Stars of the hit TV show say they did not know their on-screen husbands had previous convictions.

mundo.titulo: Israel carries out air strikes on Lebanon, state media says, as Iran claims deal with US near
mundo.resumen: The strikes come as Iran's foreign minister says a deal to end fighting with the US is close.

mundo.titulo: Harry Styles revisits X Factor as he kicks off Wembley residency
mundo.resumen: The pop star reminisces about his X Factor audition, which took place near Wembley Stadium in 2010.

mundo.titulo: Staying up to watch the match? Here's how to survive an all-nighter
mundo.resumen: Forget blocks and tackles, this is the tactical plan you need for the football.

negocios.titulo: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in stock market debut
negocios.resumen: Musk is now worth $1.11tn according to the Bloomberg rich list, while SpaceX listed on the Nasdaq stock exchange with a value of $2.2tn.

negocios.titulo: UK vows to phase out Russian diesel and jet fuel imports by new year
negocios.resumen: The ban forms part of the government's package of sanctions on Moscow due to the ongoing war with Ukraine.

negocios.titulo: 'I was employee number one': SpaceX co-founder reacts to firm's market debut
negocios.resumen: The BBC's Michelle Fleury spoke to Tom Mueller, who was one of the company's founders alongside Elon Musk in 2002.

negocios.titulo: UK economy contracts as Iran war impact felt
negocios.resumen: The economy shrank slightly in April as the Iran war began to have an impact on businesses, official data shows.

negocios.titulo: Why the economics make this the craziest World Cup ever
negocios.resumen: From trade wars to soaring ticket prices, the 2026 World Cup is unlike any before it. Faisal Islam explores what this tournament reveals about our changing global economy.

negocios.titulo: India's 'blue gold' starts a new drinks industry
negocios.resumen: Agave plants grow wild in India and new distillers are using them to create a spirits industry.

tecnologia.titulo: The FBI built its own replica small town to simulate real-world cyberattacks
tecnologia.resumen: Hidden inside a building in Alabama, the FBI has created its own small town as a dedicated cyber training ground for simulating cyberattacks.

tecnologia.titulo: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
tecnologia.resumen: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

tecnologia.titulo: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
tecnologia.resumen: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

tecnologia.titulo: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
tecnologia.resumen: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

tecnologia.titulo: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
tecnologia.resumen: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

tecnologia.titulo: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
tecnologia.resumen: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

tecnologia.titulo: Echo Isle is a pint-sized adventure inspired by classic Zelda
tecnologia.resumen: Echo Isle is heavily inspired by The Legend of Zelda, and it's not afraid to show it: The retro graphics bear a striking resemblance to Link's Awakening, the main character wears a blue tunic and wields a sword, and he navigates dungeons to collect items and keys to fight bosses and gather magical MacGuffins. But […]

tecnologia.titulo: A better way to manage all your screenshots
tecnologia.resumen: Hi, friends! Welcome to Installer No. 132, your guide to the best and Verge-iest stuff in the world. (If you're new here, welcome, happy soccer, and also you can read all the old editions at the Installer homepage.) This week, I've been preparing for a month of getting absolutely nothing done during the World Cup. […]

tecnologia.titulo: The future of Hollywood isn’t feeding prompts into vanilla gen AI models
tecnologia.resumen: For all the noise that's been made about how generative AI is poised to revolutionize the filmmaking industry, there haven't really been any projects created with the technology that felt like the sort of entertainment people would pay to see. Most AI firms' video models are still only capable of churning out short bursts of […]

tecnologia.titulo: Valve just imported 13 tons of VR headsets in one day
tecnologia.resumen: On June 10th, the German container ship Posen docked in Los Angeles after a two-week voyage from Shanghai. As Valve watcher Brad Lynch notes, it was almost certainly carrying the first mass production shipments of the Steam Frame, Valve's new gaming headset. Import records show that Valve's distribution partner Ceva offloaded nearly 32 metric tons […]

tecnologia.titulo: Nothing CEO says phone prices are going to keep going up
tecnologia.resumen: If you're thinking about upgrading your phone, "the best time was yesterday," according to Nothing CEO and co-founder Carl Pei, echoing a message we heard during MWC. As Android Authority reports, Pei said in a post on X that the RAM shortage has already impacted Nothing's less expensive mid-range phone: "For Phone 4A , memory […]

tecnologia.titulo: The world’s first trillionaire is a killer
tecnologia.resumen: Elon Musk's SpaceX IPO will probably make him the richest person to ever walk the planet. And while his mountain of horrible personal conduct could fill multiple books, one fact in particular stands out: A year ago, Musk's actions directly led to the deaths of hundreds of thousands of people. He did it knowingly. And, […]
